trivia: Dassault's omnirole fighter does everything from carrier decks to nuclear deterrence with one airframe. Its delta-canard shape and M88 engines made it one of Europe's export success stories.
Fighter transponder behavior varies with mission, so every Rafale in a civilian hobby log is a small ceremony.
funFacts: Flies from both land bases and aircraft carriers.
The name means gust of wind.
